evaluators.name: Asphalt Resurfacing Quote Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted an asphalt resurfacing quote for ~400 sq ft with standard material on a weekday morning (9–11 AM) within 30 days and correct contact details.

evaluators.name: Concrete Driveway Booking Under Budget Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user started a concrete driveway installation booking for ~600 sq ft, under $9,000 with ≥3-year warranty, and selected a card payment method.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Qualifying Sealing Plan Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked the cheapest driveway sealing plan that includes crack filling and ≥2-year warranty for a 2-car driveway on a Saturday afternoon.

evaluators.name: Save Three Qualifying Asphalt Projects Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user saved three asphalt projects between 400–800 sq ft completed within the last 2 years to favorites.

evaluators.name: ZIP 30301 Coverage Inquiry Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user handled unserved ZIP 30301 by selecting the nearest served ZIP and submitting a service area inquiry mentioning both ZIPs with correct contact info.

evaluators.name: Apply 15%+ Promo to 550 sq ft Project Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user applied an active ≥15% promo valid for 500+ sq ft to a 550 sq ft driveway/paving booking and had the discount applied on the booking summary.

evaluators.name: Highest-Rated Asphalt Replacement Crew Estimate Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user chose the highest-rated asphalt driveway replacement crew with ≥5 reviews and submitted an estimate request for ~650 sq ft.

evaluators.name: Seasonal Snow Removal Plan Signup Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user signed up for a seasonal snow removal plan suitable for ~50 ft driveway, under $600 with up to 20 visits, and selected per-season billing.
